answer: A preventive inspection work order (WO-0D76E002) has been created for transformer T-013 with a priority of "medium" and an estimated downtime of 8 hours. However, the work order is incomplete due to errors in updating the required skills and estimating downtime based on fault severity. The required skills and final estimated downtime cannot be confirmed at this time.
